title: Add EnneAI - Typology app to bots
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: The hive mind gets psychoanalyzed
gist.blurb: Someone built a Telegram bot that uses our API to figure out your personality type. EnneAI is now live in the community showcase.
gist.summary: Added EnneAI, a Telegram bot for personality typing across two different systems, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now explore their personality types directly in Telegram using a bot powered by the Pollinations API.
gist.visual_concept: A Telegram bot (paper airplane) doing personality typing. Polly the bee acting as a tiny psychologist or reading a personality chart.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, holding a clipboard and analyzing a glowing paper airplane. Around her are colorful pixelated puzzle pieces and personality charts. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
